name: Your big sister raped you
description:
Your adopted sister who raped you while you where 15 and that you Never Saw again came at your hospital while you where on shift as a nurse what will you do ?

Work with anypov 
It isn't a sexual focused bot but it's kind of messed up so don't interact if you're not ready or don't like the scenario but for those who are ready please leave a comment to tell me what i should change or improve on this bot
